Interface EncryptionContext

public interface EncryptionContext
Context to encapsulate encryption for a specific MongoPersistentProperty.
Since:
4.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Ross Lawley

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable Object
    convertToMongoType(Object value)
    Shortcut for converting a given value into its store representation using the root ValueConversionContext.
    EvaluationContext
    getEvaluationContext(@Nullable Object source)
     
    default @Nullable MongoConversionContext.OperatorContext
    getOperatorContext()
    The field name and field query operator

    Returns the MongoPersistentProperty to be handled.

    Lookup the value for a given path within the current context.

    Reads the value as an instance of the property type.

    Reads the value as an instance of type.

  • Method Details

    • getProperty

      MongoPersistentProperty getProperty()
      Returns the MongoPersistentProperty to be handled.
      Returns:
      will never be null.

    • convertToMongoType

      @Nullable Object convertToMongoType(Object value)
      Shortcut for converting a given value into its store representation using the root ValueConversionContext.
      Parameters:
      value -
      Returns:

    • read

      default <T> @Nullable T read(@Nullable Object value)
      Reads the value as an instance of the property type.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be read; can be null.
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if value cannot be read as an instance of type.

    • read

      default <T> @Nullable T read(@Nullable Object value, Class<T> target)
      Reads the value as an instance of type.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be read; can be null.
      target - type of value to be read; must not be null.
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if value cannot be read as an instance of type.

    • read

      <T> @Nullable T read(@Nullable Object value, TypeInformation<T> target)
      Reads the value as an instance of type.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be read; can be null.
      target - type of value to be read; must not be null.
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if value cannot be read as an instance of type.

    • write

      default <T> @Nullable T write(@Nullable Object value)
      Write the value as an instance of the property type.
      Parameters:
      value - value to write; can be null.
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if value cannot be written as an instance of the property type.
      See Also:
      • PersistentProperty.getTypeInformation()
      • write(Object, TypeInformation)

    • write

      default <T> @Nullable T write(@Nullable Object value, Class<T> target)
      Write the value as an instance of type.
      Parameters:
      value - value to write; can be null.
      target - type of value to be written; must not be null.
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if value cannot be written as an instance of type.

    • write

      <T> @Nullable T write(@Nullable Object value, TypeInformation<T> target)
      Write the value as an instance of given type.
      Parameters:
      value - value to write; can be null.
      target - type of value to be written; must not be null.
      Returns:
      can be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if value cannot be written as an instance of type.

    • lookupValue

      @Nullable Object lookupValue(String path)
      Lookup the value for a given path within the current context.
      Parameters:
      path - the path/property name to resolve the current value for.
      Returns:
      can be null.

    • getEvaluationContext

      EvaluationContext getEvaluationContext(@Nullable Object source)

    • getOperatorContext

      default @Nullable MongoConversionContext.OperatorContext getOperatorContext()
      The field name and field query operator
      Returns:
      can be null.
